rosacea.general_management: Gentle cleansing, non-comedogenic products, and avoiding picking. Consult a dermatologist for persistent cases.
rosacea.when_to_seek_medical_care: Seek care if symptoms rapidly worsen, spread, or do not improve with basic care.
emergency_symptoms: Sudden onset of severe nodulocystic acne.
rosacea.confidence_guidance: This prediction relies on visual AI which may overlap with other conditions. Diagnosis requires professional confirmation.

tungiasis.description: Black central dot embedded in swollen white ring at toe tip or sole, periungual.
tungiasis.common_causes: Infestation by parasitic organisms (mites, worms, insects).
tungiasis.general_management: Consult a qualified healthcare professional for appropriate antiparasitic evaluation. Environmental cleaning may be necessary.
tungiasis.when_to_seek_medical_care: Seek care if symptoms rapidly worsen, spread, or do not improve with basic care.
emergency_symptoms: Secondary severe bacterial infection (pus, extreme pain).
tungiasis.confidence_guidance: This prediction relies on visual AI which may overlap with other conditions. Diagnosis requires professional confirmation.

urticaria.description: Raised erythematous edematous wheals with pale center and flare, transient migratory itchy.
urticaria.common_causes: Allergic reactions, autoimmune blistering, or severe adverse drug reactions.
urticaria.general_management: Consult an allergist or dermatologist. Identify and withdraw offending agents.
urticaria.when_to_seek_medical_care: Seek care if symptoms rapidly worsen, spread, or do not improve with basic care.
emergency_symptoms: Widespread painful blistering exposing raw skin (TEN/SJS).
urticaria.confidence_guidance: This prediction relies on visual AI which may overlap with other conditions. Diagnosis requires professional confirmation.
